task: Local Permits & Licenses — city/county bible (sample metro)
disclaimer: Municipal permit and license intelligence from cited public sources — informational only; not legal, zoning, or tax advice. Confirm fees and applicability with the cited city/county authority.
policy: Public municipal .gov sources only; HTTP 403/404 PARKED without bypass; gaps explicit.
notes: LA County Public Health overlays for unincorporated areas and some cities — confirm jurisdiction.

regulator.agency: City of Los Angeles Office of Finance — Business Tax

cited_facts.text: Business tax registration (BTRC) with the City of Los Angeles Office of Finance is required for businesses operating in city limits; additional police commission permits apply to some industries.
